- **Colors & theme** — edit the CSS variables at the top of `style.css` (`--bg`
- **Columns / fields** — edit the `COLUMNS` array near the top of `script.js`. Add

All data stays in your browser's local storage on your device. Nothing is uploaded anywhere. Clearing your browser data will remove it — export a backup regularly from **Data & Backup → Export backup file**.
